titleStmt.title: SII 42.306: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 306. (A.R. No. 75 of 1956-57.) Chiṭṭivalasa, Visakhapatnam Taluk, Visakhapatnam District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone kept in the Travellers' Bungalow.
Dated year 5, Mēsha-saṅkrānti, Tuesday. (Written in Telugu-Kannaḍa characters of 11th-12th century A.D.).

Records the allotment of a specified share of the income from a certain levy towards maintenance of perpetual lamps in the temple of god Gokarṇēśvara-mahādēva of Guḍivāḍa in Barika alias Uttamagaṅga-dēsiyyakoṇḍa-paṭṭaṇa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samaramukhānēka ripu
da¨rppama¨rddana bhujabalaparā
krama paramamāhēśvara parama
bhaṭṭāraka mahārājādhirāja
rājarājaparamēśvara gaṁggānva
yālaṁbha(ba)nastha(staṁ)bha śrīmada
naṁttava¨rmmadēvara prava¨rddhamāna
vijayarājya saṁvatsara 5 śrāhi mē
ṣa saṁkrāntiyu maṁgaḷavāramu mōdā
lu gōpiḍākayaina yuttamagaṁggadē
dēsiyūyakoṁḍānu paṭṭaṇa di
namāḍamōlanu guḍivāḍa gōka
¨rṇṇēśvara mahādēvaraku Akhaṁḍadī
pamunaku baccuveṭṭaṁgala seṭṭi
ṟukaccuna vīsdāmu rāca dha¨rmmuvu
gā kūlikūṭamuna nelareṁḍu vāḍi
kalu kaṁgāṇulu samakaṭṭu koraḍi
kāṟu pātikayu nelanela dappaka (ku)
ṁḍabeṭṭaṁgalavāru Ī māḍa mō
beḍavāka guḍivāḍagala yantagālamu
Ī dha¨rmmuvu Evvarēni vighnaṁsēsināru gaṁgga
kaṟutavēyi gavu(vi)lala vadhiṁcina pātakamu
tappaṇasēsina pātakamuna pōvaṁgalavāru
Digital edition of SII 42.306 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
